results.rendered_html:
amāṃsa a.
1 Without flesh, not containing flesh.
2 Lean, thin, weak, enfeebled.
— saṃ Not flesh, any thing but flesh.
Comp.
— odanika a. (kī f.) not relating to a preparation of rice with meat.
